inputs.label: Sum of Weighted Squared Residuals (Σ w_i (y_i - ŷ_i)²)
inputs.businessContext: The total weighted sum of squared differences between observed and predicted values.

inputs.label: Number of Data Points (n)
inputs.businessContext: The number of measurements in the regression.

inputs.label: Number of Parameters (p)
inputs.businessContext: The number of fitted parameters in the regression model (e.g., slope and intercept).

inputs.label: Significance Level (α)
inputs.businessContext: The probability of rejecting a valid model when MSWD exceeds the critical value; used for testing if MSWD indicates overdispersion.
